title: I figli di nessuno
writer: Ubaldo Maria Del Colle, Ruggero Rindi
actors: Leda Gys, Ubaldo Colle Del Colle, Ermanno Roveri
plot: Three part melodrama later reworked in the 50s by Matarazzo: A count has an illegitimate child with a woman who his elderly mother tries to separate him from, and who later retreats into a convent.
